title: Midazolam and Dexmedetomidine Promoted Migration of Human Lung Adenocarcinoma A549 Cells.
abstract: The numerous studies of the effects of intravenous anesthetics on cancer have suggested potential effects on cell migration and postoperative outcomes. This study compared the direct effects of midazolam and dexmedetomidine on A549 human lung adenocarcinoma cells.
journal: Journal of Nippon Medical School = Nippon Ika Daigaku zasshi
